top_signals.title: Reeves warned Iran war oil shock will lead to government borrowing spike
top_signals.summary: Chancellor Rachel Reeves has been warned that government borrowing is set to spike as a result of the Iran war as the Office for Budget Responsibility admitted it had underestimated the effects of the last energy price shock.  In a review of its forecasting models, the OBR suggested it had learned lessons from Russia’s full-scale [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Mortgage approvals jump to 15-month high despite Iran war chaos
top_signals.summary: Mortgage approvals made a surprise jump to a 15-month high in April, despite continued signs that the economic chaos caused by the Iran war is shaking confidence in the property market. Net mortgage approvals jumped three per cent to 65,900 in April, above the six-month average of around 63,100, according to Bank of England data. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Gold price falls nearly 2% as Middle East tensions escalate again
top_signals.summary: Spot gold set a weekly low of $4,450/oz. during the early trading hours.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: morph Launches the World’s First Shapeshifting Soft Robotics Cells Platform to Bring Physical AI into Real-World Applications
top_signals.summary: Backed by 8VC, Pharrell Williams, Copper, Harvey Spevak of Equinox Group, Qubit Ventures, Valia Ventures, and Blue Lion
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Shoppers are treating themselves to bras and underwear at Victoria's Secret despite gas price gloom
top_signals.summary: Victoria's Secret has been in the midst of a turnaround under CEO Hillary Super, who said the company is winning over young shoppers across all incomes.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Trump Premium Supercharges Bond Rallies Across Emerging Markets
top_signals.summary: Emerging-market investors are zeroing in on a key metric as they size up the riskiness of a country’s debt: whether its leaders are in good standing with President Donald Trump.

top_signals.title: Activist shareholder Elliot built A$1B stake in Northern Star
top_signals.summary: This would place Elliot amongst the top 5 shareholders, joining the likes of Van Eck Associates and BlackRock.

top_signals.title: TON jumps 15% as The Open Network plans rebrand to Gram
top_signals.summary: Telegram founder Pavel Durov says it is “returning to our roots — and starting a new chapter” by rebranding Toncoin to Gram.

top_signals.title: Google fixes one actively exploited Android zero-day, 124 flaws
top_signals.summary: Google has released the June 2026 Android security patches to address 124 vulnerabilities, including one zero-day flaw exploited in targeted attacks. [...]
